name: powerbi-modeling-mcp
description: The Power BI Modeling MCP Server, brings Power BI semantic modeling capabilities to your agents.

configuration.title: Power BI Modeling MCP Server Extension configuration

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the MCP server (e.g., '--start --skipconfirmation --readonly')

environmentVariables.description: Environment variables as comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g., 'PBI_MODELING_MCP_CLIENT_ID = xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx')

scripts.package:win32-x64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-x64
scripts.package:win32-arm64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target win32-arm64
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --target darwin-arm64
scripts.package:all: npm run package:win32 && npm run package:win32-arm64 && npm run package:darwin-arm64
